# Cafe655

> The digital cafe of Cafe655.

## About

Cafe655 is a personal website and digital cafe. It hosts multiple sub-sites covering different topics and projects.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://cafe655.com): The main landing page with links to all sub-sites.
- [Ai Field Notes](https://cafe655.com/ai-field-notes): AI reference guides, podcast, and resources.
- [Barista Painting Services](https://cafe655.com/barista-painting): Painting services.
- [Cafe655 on Twitch](https://cafe655.com/cafe655-on-twitch): Twitch streaming content.
- [Cafe655 Personal](https://cafe655.com/personal): Personal content and writing.

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js and hosted on Vercel
- Content is server-rendered for accessibility
